fields.name: submission_type
fields.description: The specific type of regulatory submission. Examples:

fields.name: regulator
fields.description: The regulatory body receiving the submission. One of: FDA | SEC | FinCEN | CFTC | FINRA | FTC | CFPB | State | Other

fields.name: submission_date
fields.description: Date the submission was filed or submitted, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: acceptance_date
fields.description: Date the regulator formally accepted the submission for review, format YYYY-MM-DD (null if not stated)

fields.name: decision_date
fields.description: Date the regulator issued a final decision, format YYYY-MM-DD (null if pending or not stated)

fields.name: submission_status
fields.description: Current status of the submission. One of: Accepted | Under_Review | Approved | Refused | Withdrawn | Pending | Deficient | null

fields.name: submission_id
fields.description: The unique identifier assigned to the submission. This may be a docket number (FDA), accession number (SEC EDGAR), CTR/SAR reference number (FinCEN), or other regulatory reference ID

fields.name: cover_letter_date
fields.description: Date of the cover letter accompanying the submission, format YYYY-MM-DD (null if no cover letter)

fields.name: filing_period_from
fields.description: Start date of the filing period (e.g., fiscal year start for 10-K, quarter start for 10-Q), format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: filing_period_to
fields.description: End date of the filing period (e.g., fiscal year end for 10-K), format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: submitting_entity_name
fields.description: Full legal name of the entity filing the submission

fields.name: submitting_entity_id
fields.description: The primary regulatory identifier for the submitting entity. This may be a CIK (SEC), LEI, EIN, FDA Establishment Identifier, or other ID

fields.name: review_division
fields.description: The specific division, branch, or office within the regulator that reviews this submission (null if not applicable or not stated)

fields.name: subject_of_submission
fields.description: Brief description of the subject matter of the filing (up to 300 chars)

fields.name: material_change_described
fields.description: Boolean — true if the submission discloses or describes a material change, event, or condition

fields.name: confidentiality_request
fields.description: Boolean — true if the submitting entity has requested confidential treatment of all or part of the submission

sections.title: Dates And Terms
sections.description: Dates And Terms fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Document Details
sections.description: Document Details fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Parties
sections.description: Parties fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Property Or Asset
sections.description: Property Or Asset fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Risk And Compliance
sections.description: Risk And Compliance fields extracted from the document.

completeness_checklist.description: All required fields are present or explicitly null with low confidence when absent.
Each declared section was reviewed for extractable evidence.
Object array fields use their item_schema for consistent nested extraction.
